name: Schedule Operation
description: Schedule a grid operation to run at a future time. Returns a handle used to trigger the event early or cancel it. The operation fires with the authority captured from the caller.

operation.description: Reference of the operation to invoke when due

input.description: Input passed to the operation when it fires

time.description: Absolute fire time, in milliseconds since the epoch

after.description: Fire after this many milliseconds from now (alternative to time)

time.description: Absolute fire time, in milliseconds since the epoch
